nodes.name: charts.csv
nodes.summary: Chart recommendation reference data mapping data-visualization needs to chart types, color guidance, accessibility notes, library choices, and interaction levels.
nodes.languageNotes: CSV rows encode chart-selection heuristics for UI generation prompts.

nodes.name: colors.csv
nodes.summary: Color palette reference data for product categories, including primary, secondary, CTA, background, text, and border hex values with usage notes.
nodes.languageNotes: Rows act as palette presets keyed by product type for downstream design-system selection.

nodes.name: icons.csv
nodes.summary: Icon lookup data mapping UI categories and keywords to Lucide icon names, imports, usage guidance, best-fit contexts, and style metadata.
nodes.languageNotes: The dataset bridges natural-language UI intent to concrete Lucide React imports.

nodes.name: landing.csv
nodes.summary: Landing-page pattern data describing section order, CTA placement, color strategy, effects, and conversion guidance for common page archetypes.
nodes.languageNotes: Rows combine content sequencing with conversion-focused UI heuristics.

nodes.name: products.csv
nodes.summary: Product-type design guidance linking product categories and keywords to style recommendations, landing patterns, dashboard styles, palettes, and implementation considerations.
nodes.languageNotes: This CSV serves as a product taxonomy for choosing visual systems and page patterns.

nodes.name: react-performance.csv
nodes.summary: React and Next.js performance guidance data covering common issue categories, severity, recommended practices, anti-patterns, and good versus bad code examples.
nodes.languageNotes: Rows pair performance smells with concrete remediation examples for prompt retrieval.

nodes.name: styles.csv
nodes.summary: UI style taxonomy data detailing visual style categories, colors, animation effects, suitability, accessibility, framework compatibility, prompt keywords, and design variables.
nodes.languageNotes: The wide CSV schema captures both design guidance and implementation tokens for each style family.

nodes.name: typography.csv
nodes.summary: Typography pairing reference data listing heading and body font combinations, moods, best-fit use cases, Google Fonts URLs, CSS imports, Tailwind config snippets, and notes.
nodes.languageNotes: Rows provide ready-to-apply font pairing metadata for generated UI systems.

nodes.name: ui-reasoning.csv
nodes.summary: UI reasoning decision data connecting product categories to recommended patterns, style priorities, color and typography moods, effects, decision rules, anti-patterns, and severity.
nodes.languageNotes: Several rows include structured decision-rule payloads embedded in CSV fields.

nodes.name: ux-guidelines.csv
nodes.summary: UX guideline reference data cataloging interface issues by category and platform with recommended fixes, anti-patterns, examples, and severity ratings.
nodes.languageNotes: The dataset is organized as actionable UX lint rules with good and bad implementation examples.

nodes.name: web-interface.csv
nodes.summary: Web interface quality guidance covering accessibility, forms, keyboard behavior, responsive layout, and implementation examples with severity levels.
nodes.languageNotes: Rows capture high-priority web UI checks suitable for retrieval during frontend implementation.
